zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock於1338年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾霍德索可時，他的父親Hugh de Cressy25歲，母親Matilda de Paunton24歲。他和Agnes De Swan至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1383年8月19日在他的家鄉享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock于1338年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾霍德索可时，他的父亲Hugh de Cressy25岁，母亲Matilda de Paunton24岁。他和Agnes De Swan至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1383年8月19日在他的家乡享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cressy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Creasey  , a cognate of 2 below.

French: habitational name from any of several places in northern France, in Saône-et-Loire, Seine-Maritime, and Somme, all named with the Gallic personal name Crixsos (from Latin Crixsus) ‘curly-haired man’ + the Latin locative suffix -acum. This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Creasey
meanings: English (Lincolnshire, or Norman origin): habitational name from Cressy in Seine-Maritime, France (see   Cressy  ).
Possibly an Americanized form of any of the German names mentioned at   Creasy  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock was born in 1338, in Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Hugh de Cressy, was 25 and his mother, Matilda de Paunton, was 24. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Agnes De Swan. He died on 19 August 1383, in his hometown, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock est né en 1338, à Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Cressy, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Paunton, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Agnes De Swan. Il est décédé le 19 août 1383, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock 1338 in Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Cressy 25 und seine Mutter Matilda de Paunton 24. Er hatte mit Agnes De Swan mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 19. August 1383 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock è nato il nel 1338 nel Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Cressy, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Matilda de Paunton, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Agnes De Swan. Morì il 19 agosto 1383, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Cressy of Hodsockが1338年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホードソックで生まれた時，父Hugh de Cressyは25歳，母Matilda de Pauntonは24歳であった。彼はAgnes De Swanとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1383年8月19日に故郷で45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock(이)가 1338년 영국 노틴그함실르 호드속에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Cressy(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Paunton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Agnes De Swan(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1383년 8월 19일 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United K: Lincoln, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock nasceu em 1338, em Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Cressy, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Paunton, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Agnes De Swan. Ele faleceu em 19 de agosto de 1383, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock родился в 1338 г. в местности ходсокк, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Cressy было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Paunton, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Agnes De Swan. Он умер 19 августа 1383 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Cressy of Hodsock nació en 1338, en Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Cressy, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Matilda de Paunton, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Agnes De Swan. Murió el 19 de agosto de 1383, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años.
